subject: Missing item in order BBY-10042
description: I ordered a Cheese Baby with Extra Cheese but it was not in the delivery bag.

messages.body: Hi, I just received my order BBY-10042 and the Cheese Baby with Extra Cheese is missing from the bag. I only got the 2 OG Babys and the fries. Can you help?

Hi! I'm really sorry about the missing item. I've checked with the kitchen and confirmed the oversight. We've credited 100 Baby Coins to your account as compensation, and a fresh Cheese Baby with Extra Cheese is being prepared right now. It should reach you within 25 minutes.
That's great, thank you! Really appreciate the quick response.

The replacement Cheese Baby has been delivered. Once again, sorry for the inconvenience. Enjoy your meal! We've also added a Free Delivery voucher to your account for your next order. Is there anything else I can help with?

resolution: 100 Baby Coins credited + replacement item delivered + Free Delivery voucher issued

subject: Feedback on the new Protein Power Bowl
description: Wanted to share some thoughts on the new Protein Power Bowl from the healthy menu.

messages.body: Hey team! I've been ordering the Protein Power Bowl regularly and I love it. Just a small suggestion - it would be amazing if you could add a tofu option as a protein add-on alongside the paneer. Also, the portion of quinoa could be slightly more generous. Other than that, it's easily my favourite healthy menu item. Keep it up!

Hi! Thanks so much for the thoughtful feedback - it really helps us improve. I've forwarded both suggestions (tofu add-on and quinoa portion) to our menu development team. They're actually working on expanding the healthy menu add-ons next month, so your timing is perfect. We'll keep you posted! Thanks for being such a loyal customer.

subject: Late delivery for order BBY-10039
description: My Valentine's Day order was delivered 20 minutes after the estimated time.

messages.body: Hi, my order BBY-10039 was supposed to arrive by 7:25 PM but it came at 7:42 PM. It was a Valentine's Day dinner so the timing was important. The food was still warm thankfully, but the wait was frustrating.

Hi, I completely understand your frustration, especially on Valentine's Day. I can see the delay was caused by high order volume in your area. This isn't the experience we want for you. I've added a Free Delivery coupon (FREEDELIVERY) to your account for your next 3 orders.
Thanks, that's very generous. The food itself was great as always - the Big Baby Loaded with extra patty is incredible. Just the timing was off. Appreciate the quick resolution!

resolution: Free Delivery coupon (FREEDELIVERY) issued for next 3 orders
